svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="YAT scenario authoring" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="onprem-current" name="YAT — Starting on-prem"> <mxGraphModel dx="1572" dy="1072" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="950" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Cremorne Campus — Network Topology (Starting State, On-Premises LMS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1420" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=14;" value="Internet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="690" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="firewall" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Edge Firewall / Router
(redundant — no SPOF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="660" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=12;" value="VPN Server
(staff-only remote access)
SPOF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="900" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_int_fw" edge="1" parent="1" source="internet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="firewall"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_vpn" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;" target="vpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E0F2F1;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Staff Network Zone" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="620" width="720" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B2DFDB;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=12;" value="Staff Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="260" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_staffsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="staffsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 1
AD / DHCP / DNS
Windows Server 2016" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="70" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 2
AD / DHCP / DNS
Windows Server 2016" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="260" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sysmgmt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="System Management Server
Monitoring + nightly backups
Windows Server 2016" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="450" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsvc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Application Services Server
Accounting / Office Admin
Windows Server 2016" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="70" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lms" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="LMS Server
DOODLE + MySQL
Windows Server 2016
⚠ EOL · MISSION CRITICAL · SPOF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="290" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstaff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Staff Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="530" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Staff Desktops
~25 × Windows 10 Enterprise (AD-joined)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="70" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mfp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Multifunction Printers
~5 staff locations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="410" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc1" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc2" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_sysmgmt" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="sysmgmt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_appsvc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="appsvc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_lms" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=2;" target="lms"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_nas" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="nasstaff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="staffpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_mfp" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="mfp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Student Network Zone" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="620" width="660" x="800" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=12;" value="Student Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="990" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_studentsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="studentsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstudent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Student Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="830" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Student Desktops
~80 × Windows 10 Enterprise + O365 Education
AD-joined" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="600" x="830" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="classprinter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Classroom Printers
~15 — one per classroom" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="600" x="830" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_nas" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="nasstudent"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="studentpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_print" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="classprinter"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lms_to_students" edge="1" parent="1" source="lms" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;curved=1;" target="studentpc" value="AD-permissioned LMS access"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend
━━━ Network plumbing (no SPOF)
━━━ LMS critical path (mission-critical, SPOF)
┄┄┄ AD-permissioned LMS access (logical)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="380" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

Legend
━━━ Network plumbing (no SPOF)
━━━ LMS critical path (mission-critical, SPOF)
┄┄┄ AD-permissioned LMS access (logical)
